description: Slim Notebook with Soft-Touch Cover & Pen Loop The Wild Bloom Slim Notebook with Pen combines style, practicality, and convenience in a compact pocket-sized design . Featuring a soft-touch cover in Pink or Floral , this small lined notebook is perfect for note-taking, journaling, or planning on the go . The 96 sheets / 192 lined pages of FSC-certified 70gsm paper ensure a smooth writing experience while supporting eco-friendly sourcing. Secure & Practical Design for Everyday Use This small notebook with pen is designed for daily use , whether at work, school, home, or while travelling . The popper clasp closure keeps the pages protected, while the pen loop securely holds the matching blue ink ballpoint pen , so you’ll always have a pen on hand. Features You’ll Love: Soft-touch cover for a premium feel. Ruled pages for neat and structured writing. Ribbon bookmark for easy page tracking. Popper clasp keeps the notebook securely closed. Compact 15cm x 9cm size , perfect for handbags, backpacks, or pockets. Perfect for Work, Study & Gifting This slim pocket notebook with pen is an essential stationery item for professionals, students, and creatives . Whether used as a travel journal, daily planner, or personal diary , its compact size and elegant design make it a versatile companion . Looking for a thoughtful gift ? This small notebook makes an ideal present for birthdays, Christmas, back-to-school, or any stationery lover . Stay organised in style with the Wild Bloom Soft-Touch Notebook & Pen Set – the perfect blend of fashion, function, and portability ! Read more
